CustomField.description: Field used to calculate the sum between the Level of influence & the Level of support for each contact (providing similar result as the 'decision maker matrix' in the companie object) That allows to rank the contacts Field visible for admins & reports only
CustomField.formula: VALUE(CASE(Level_of_Influence__c, "Hardly Influences Decision", "1", "Slight Influence", "2", "Influences Decision", "3", "Strong Influencer", "4", "Minor Decision Maker", "5", "A Decision Maker", "6", "Major Decision Maker", "7", "Only Decision Maker", "8", "" )) + VALUE(CASE(Level_of_Support__c, "Will Recommend Competition", "1", "Strongly for Competition", "2", "Mildly Negative", "3", "Sees You Same as Everyone Else", "4", "Interested in You", "5", "Supporter of Yours", "6", "Strong Supporter", "7", "Will Recommend You", "8", "" ))
CustomField.label: Median influence
